title: Eva Screenings in PA
wikitext:
[]: Eva Screenings in PA             Quote Post by Cinema169 » Thu Mar 17, 2011 7:51 pm Hello there. I was alerted by a customer today that members of this site would probably be interested in knowing that starting tomorrow night: Evangelion 1.0 & 2.0 will be playing in the Greater Philadelphia area! If you live in the Delaware Valley area you should check us out. Our website is at: http://www.cinema169.com/Home/Evangelion.html We're located about 10-15 minutes outside Philadelphia in Delaware County. Come and join us at Cinema 16:9 in Lansdowne and see Eva on the big screen! Directions at: http://maps.google.com/maps/place?oe=utf-8&rls=org.mozilla:en-US:official&client=firefox-a&um=1&ie=UTF-8&q=cinema+169&fb=1&gl=us&hq=cinema+169&hnear=East+Lansdowne,+PA&cid=17013411866741625187

[]: EVANGELION SHOWING @ LANSDOWNE THEATRE, PA. 1.0 Fri, 2.0 Sat             Quote Post by ikarus » Thu Mar 17, 2011 8:39 pm http://www.lansdownetheater.org/home.html
